typography.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

components.card: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden
components.button_primary: bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 text-slate-950 font-bold px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.button_secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white font-medium px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors border border-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.input: bg-slate-900/80 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-white placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500/50 focus:border-amber-500 transition-all
components.th: pb-4 font-medium text-slate-400 border-b border-slate-800 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs
components.badge_low_stock: px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-500 border border-rose-500/20
components.badge_in_stock: px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20

login_background.description: Moody dark bar interior with empty wine glasses hanging above a counter. Use for the left half of the login screen to set the premium nightlife atmosphere.

product_cocktail_1.description: Orange cocktail with rosemary. Use as a product image placeholder in the POS view for visually appealing inventory.

product_cocktail_2.description: Smoked cocktail with fruit. Use as a product image placeholder.

product_cocktail_3.description: Close up drink. Use as a product image placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or import in CSS: 'Outfit' (weights 400,500,600,700) and 'Manrope' (weights 400,500,600,700).
Install Phosphor icons: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react` for high-end POS iconography. Do not use generic icons.
Install Recharts for the Dashboard sales chart: `yarn add recharts`. Customize charts to use the dark theme (grid lines slate-800, bars amber-500).
All components must be written in Javascript (.jsx/.js), not Typescript.
The application should force a dark mode experience globally (`bg-slate-950` as the app root). Use the Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) palette with Amber and Slate.

Design the main POS (Point of Sale) layout under the 'Vender' page: Create a 70/30 grid split. The left 70% shows a grid of available stock items (use provided cocktail images). The right 30% is a fixed 'Conta Corrente/Carrinho' panel where you select the Client from a dropdown, review items, see the total debt increase, and click a massive Amber 'REGISTAR VENDA' button.
Client Profile (Ficha do Cliente): Build a dedicated view showing total amount owed ('Conta Corrente'), a list of their past consumptions, and a 'Registar Pagamento' button to clear debts.
Stock Management (Gestão de Stock): Build a data-dense table showing Product Name, Quantity, Price, and Status. Include a 'Carregar Stock' action to replenish quantities and register costs.
Low Stock Alerts: Emphasize items with low stock directly on the dashboard using the 'badge_low_stock' styles and a dedicated card.

CRITICAL TESTABILITY: Add kebab-case `data-testid` attributes to every button, input, list item, and key text element (e.g., `data-testid='login-email-input'`, `data-testid='pos-checkout-btn'`, `data-testid='client-debt-total'`).
